# IOSurfaceGetSeed(_:) | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ IOSurface ](/documentation/iosurface)

- [ IOSurfaceGetSeed(_:) ](/documentation/iosurface/iosurfacegetseed(_:))

-  IOSurfaceGetSeed(_:) 

Function# IOSurfaceGetSeed(_:)

iOS 11.0+iPadOS 11.0+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.6+tvOS 11.0+visionOS 1.0+

```
func IOSurfaceGetSeed(_ buffer: IOSurfaceRef) -> UInt32
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/iosurface/iosurfacegetseed(_:)#Discussion)

This will return the current seed value of the buffer and is a cheap call to make to see if the contents of the buffer have changed since the last lock/unlock.
